scope: GSC-only (Google Search Console + keyword master list). Competitor #1-blocker and AI-visibility sections remain manual and are intentionally not auto-generated here.
wins: Core local term holds top tier: 'bariatric counseling san antonio' at #3 (local-primary); MoM path 1.0 (May) -> 2.0 (Jun) -> 3.0 now, still page-1.
'bariatric surgery counseling' is the strongest real mover: pos ~7.5, delta +3.2, with 6 impressions (national-primary) - best combination of improvement AND non-trivial impressions.
'eating disorder counseling san antonio' up +3.1 to pos 25.4 on 5 impressions - ED lane gaining ground.
Blog content pulling page-1-ish impressions: the bariatric-surgery 'comprehensive guide' post = 119 impressions @ pos 11.3, and 'coordinate-with-medical-providers' = 69 impressions @ pos 8.8.
needs_attention: Keyword coverage (KEYWORDS, not pages): 17 of 82 tracked keywords show GSC impressions this snapshot; 65 show none. This is a keyword count - most tracked terms simply had no impressions in the 7-day window, not missing pages. Coverage dipped from 19/82 on the 07-20 run; single-impression terms drop in and out day to day, so treat as directional.
Most-slipped commercial term with real impressions: 'bariatric counseling' (national-primary) fell delta -4.9 to pos ~10.2 on 11 impressions - the clearest at-risk page-1 term.

Visibility timeline: tracked-snapshot impressions fell from 2447 (2026-05-07) to 254 (2026-07-22) and impression-weighted avg position drifted 14.9 -> 21.8 first-vs-last; snapshot windows/methodology differ across the series, so read directionally. Vs the immediate prior run (07-20) position actually improved (25.7 -> 21.8) while impressions eased (381 -> 254).
Near-zero CTR: 2 clicks on 254 impressions (~0.8%). Impressions exist but are not converting to clicks - a title/meta/snippet and internal-link opportunity, not purely a ranking problem.

Page mapping: 50 distinct target pages in the tracker, of which only 2 are staging-targeted ('what-is-a-bariatric-counselor', 'what-is-a-weight-loss-counselor') and 48 are live www URLs. A staging targetUrl is most likely a stale pointer to a page already live on www (hygiene), not an unpublished page; a handful of staging pages may await push - confirm via a staging-vs-prod sitemap diff or Daniel's notes, do not infer a count from this data.
priority_actions: Tracker hygiene: repoint the 2 staging targetUrls (what-is-a-bariatric-counselor, what-is-a-weight-loss-counselor) in keywords-master.json to their correct live www URLs so GSC can match them; verify the live slug via a staging-vs-prod sitemap diff first.
Defend the core: on-page refresh + internal links for 'bariatric counseling' (slipped -4.9, 11 imp, pos ~10.2) to reclaim its page-1 slot, and hold 'bariatric counseling san antonio' at #3.

Fix CTR: add strong CTAs and internal links from the high-impression blog posts (bariatric-surgery comprehensive guide = 119 imp; FAQ page = 93 imp) into the matching service and contact pages to convert impressions into clicks.
AI/rich-result eligibility: confirm FAQ schema is emitting on high-impression pages (FAQ page, service pages) for AI-overview and rich-snippet coverage.
If a staging->prod publish backlog is real, confirm the actual push list via a staging-vs-prod sitemap diff or Daniel's notes - do not act on an inferred count.
summary: GSC-only refresh: the core San Antonio and bariatric-surgery terms are healthy (bariatric counseling san antonio #3, bariatric surgery counseling +3.2 @ ~7.5), but 'bariatric counseling' slipped -4.9 and overall CTR is ~0.8% on 254 impressions. Top priority is tracker hygiene on 2 stale staging pointers plus CTR/internal-link work on high-impression blog posts. Competitor and AI-visibility sections stay manual.
